_meta.entity: L&T Finance Limited (NSE: LTF, BSE: 533519, CIN L67120MH2008PLC181833)
_meta.source_primary: march-31-2026--consolidated-results.pdf  (SEBI Reg 33/52 audited results pack, Board mtg 24-Apr-2026; contains BOTH consolidated [pp.1-12] and standalone [pp.13-22])
_meta.auditors: Brahmayya & Co. + T R Chadha & Co LLP (joint statutory auditors)
_meta.audit_opinion: UNMODIFIED on both consolidated and standalone (pp.7,11,15,19). No qualification, no emphasis of matter in this pack.
_meta.verified_by: orchestrator firsthand from pdftotext -layout, page-cited; numbers in INR crore unless %
data_integrity_flags_at_source: Two 27MB PDFs (consolidated-results.pdf / standalone-results.pdf) are BYTE-IDENTICAL (MD5 f941cf96...) - redundant download, the single file already contains both entity levels.

screener cons_6417.xlsx / stand_6417.xlsx use a generic MANUFACTURING template (Raw Material, Inventory Days, Power & Fuel, EV/EBITDA, OPM%) force-fit on an NBFC -> those ratios are analytically INVALID for a lender and are discarded; only mappable lines (PAT, equity, borrowings, total assets, dividend, share count) used for long-horizon trend.
Note 11/15: 'no separate reportable segments per Ind AS 108' -> NO audited segment-level profitability or asset quality; all segment/AUM-mix data is management-reported (unaudited).
GS3/NS3/CRAR are 'Not Applicable at consolidated level' (p.12); RBI asset-quality ratios are disclosed only at STANDALONE level (p.22).
Note 15/19: 'Previous period/year figures regrouped/reclassified' - comparability caveat.

net_loss_derecognition_amortised_cost._note: DOUBLED YoY; this is the net write-off / sell-down loss, sits OUTSIDE the impairment line

impairment_fin_instruments._note: FLAT YoY despite +25.6% loan growth - the headline 'credit cost' driver

exceptional_items._note: New Labour Codes one-time past-service-cost provision; net of tax -21.33cr; a CONSERVATIVE charge, not a flattering gain (Note 7)

combined_credit_cost_impair_plus_derecog._note: TRUE credit cost rose ~11%, NOT flat - the derecognition line is the missing half

net_cash_operating._note: structurally negative (loans disbursed net -25,154.71); normal for growing NBFC

gold_loan_acquisition._note: Paul Merchants Finance gold-loan business, net of cash acquired

dividend_income._note: upstreamed from subsidiaries (standalone-only); explains standalone PAT > consol PAT

exceptional_items._note: New Labour Codes; net of tax -21.27cr

npa_sold_to_ARCs._note: SOLD ABOVE net book value -> small GAIN; ARC sales are NOT a material NPA-dumping channel (only ~128cr)

covid_restructured_resolution_framework._note: restructured book small and running off

project_finance_under_implementation._note: residual legacy wholesale tail with stress; small vs total book

gold_loan_acquisition.target: Paul Merchants Finance Pvt Ltd (PMFL) gold-loan business
gold_loan_acquisition._note: INORGANIC component of FY26 growth - ~1,335cr gold AUM + 196cr goodwill created

dividend._note: FLAT despite PAT +13% -> payout shrinking, capital retained for growth

valuation_anchors._note: BVPS = consol networth 27983.53 / ~250.44cr shares; verify share count from EPS/PAT
